MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 287352 Conservatorship of Louise Hobbs.

Appearances: Alicia Adornato for Grover Jackson.

Ms. Adornato requested a six week continuance. Both matters were continued to October 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
